# SSH and Remote Compute: Servers, GPU Pods, HPC

<!-- STUB (Phase 0). Scope: PLAN.md Section 8, Ch 13. ~/.ssh/config,
     port forwarding, VS Code Remote. + SSH key hygiene. + Data movement
     (rsync/scp, DANGER on rsync --delete + trailing slash, checksum
     verify, tar/gzip, du/df/ncdu). + GPU pods (Runpod, nvtop). + SLURM/
     HPC recognize-and-route (one page, droppable). Drafted in Phase 5. -->
